title: baphorhiza lutea
intro: Baphorhiza lutea, also known as the "Golden Baphorhiza", is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Baphorhiza lutea include its potential to treat fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Baphorhiza lutea can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
